text.title: SDD Promotion Gate Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: list-blockers
step.action: Enumerate open blockers from tracker + brief.

step.name: attach-evidence
step.action: Link file / PR / URL per yes.

step.name: validate-and-promote
step.action: Run validate-sdd-promotion-gate-checklist.py; if OK move feature to `todo/`.
